message:
fix(web): improve wizard step 5 UX for VPS IP entry

- Remove redundant 5th checkbox "Copied the IP address" (4 items now)
- Add prominent guidance message when checklist is complete
- Move IP input section immediately after checklist for visibility
- Add hint messages for all edge states (missing IP, invalid IP, etc.)
- Change example IPs from private 192.168.x.x to RFC 5737 doc IP 203.0.113.42
- Update directional text ("box below" -> "box above") after reorganization

Fixes bug where Continue button remained inactive after checking all boxes
because users didn't scroll down far enough to see the IP input field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
